title: Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXIX. Riddles.
content:
[Gloves.]

        As I was going o'er London Bridge,
        I met a cart full of fingers and thumbs!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXIX. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
